message.content:
Subject: Reflecting on Our Recent Interaction

Hi [Colleague's Name],

I wanted to reach out after our last conversation. I've been thinking about what happened, and while I stand by my perspective on the matter, I realize it may have come across more sharply than intended. Tensions run high in our fast-paced environment, and I value our working relationship too much to let this linger.

That said, I believe we've both got a lot on our plates right now, and rehashing details might just create more friction. How about we hit pause on this for a bit—focus on the deliverables ahead—and circle back only if something critical comes up? I'd appreciate your thoughts on that approach.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
